design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate platforming gauntlet while managing single-hit armor durability; defeat enemies using limited weapons; retrieve treasure for upgrades
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Permadeath of armor on any hit creates constant resource scarcity and punishment for mistakes
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Knight Arthur rescuing princess Prin-Prin from demon king Astaroth by fighting through hordes of undead
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Unforgiving single-hit-loss-of-armor mechanic creates genuine consequence and difficulty; mandatory second playthrough at higher difficulty for true ending—refuses casual completion paths

difficulty.lives_system: Arthur loses armor on single hit, forced to continue in boxers until finding new armor or dying
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based checkpoint system; death returns player to stage start
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Low agency; difficulty is fixed and punishing. Game design philosophy demands mastery rather than offering difficulty options

progression.upgrade_system: Armor tiers and weapon variety found in treasure chests throughout stages; better armor provides different aesthetics but same single-hit vulnerability
progression.unlock_mechanism: Linear stage progression; mandatory second playthrough at higher difficulty to reach true ending
replayability_hooks: Two-tier difficulty structure requiring complete second run
Multiple weapon types to discover and master
High skill ceiling encourages speedrunning and no-hit-damage runs

world_building_techniques: Stage environment design (haunted grounds, demon realms) establishes setting
Enemy types (undead, goblins, demons) reinforce gothic horror theme
Iconic visual: Arthur in boxers after armor loss creates memorable character moment

faction_indicators: Knight Arthur (heroic human faction fighting for rescue/order)
Demon King Astaroth (evil supernatural faction opposing humans)
danger_signals: Hordes of undead and demonic enemies throughout world
Princess kidnapping by demon king signals threat to human realm
Demon World Village setting indicates active supernatural invasion
environmental_storytelling: Haunted/demonic stage themes communicate hostile supernatural environment
Treasure chests with armor and weapons suggest previous adventurers and ongoing conflict
Princess in distress archetype reinforces rescue mission narrative
